shipRecommendationReason: Security-sensitive local path-boundary hardening for optional pgvector recall. The repaired branch closes the symlink escape found during Codex review and is appropriate for the functional-labs train, not a standalone release cut.
reviewDisposition: Codex found and fixed one additional bug: in-root symlinks could resolve outside the pgvector source root before disk reads.

bugsFixedByCodexReview.bug: Lexical source-path validation did not resolve symlinks, so an in-root symlink could point indexSource() at a file outside the allowed root.
bugsFixedByCodexReview.fix: Added realpath containment validation before healthCheck() and readFileSync() when PgvectorStore reads source files from disk.
bugsFixedByCodexReview.regression: apps/desktop/electron/pgvector-store.test.ts covers lexical traversal and symlink traversal, both before healthCheck().

verification: Codex Security diff scan report validation and HTML render
